# Pane di Matteo

Italian artisan bakery in Highton, Geelong. Family bread-making
tradition going back forty years. Bread, pastries, coffee, and
light lunch.

## About
Founded 2014 by Matt Santoro. Everything made by hand, on-site,
each morning. Sells out by late morning most days.

## Products
- Sourdough, ciabatta, baguettes, focaccia
- Croissants, cannoli, biscotti
- Full espresso menu with alternative milks
- Focaccia, baguettes, panini for lunch

## Visit
- Address: 12 Porter Ave, Highton VIC 3216
- Phone: (03) 5245 7492
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/panedimatteo
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7am–1pm, Sat 7:30am–12:30pm, Sun 8:30am–11:30am
  (all "until sold out -- come early")

- [Homepage](https://panedimatteo.com/)
